exploration_notes: Identified all 19 files containing references to ScoreExtensions or ScoreExtensionNormalize via git grep across the full repository. The dependency chain flows from the interface definition in interface.go → metrics constant in metrics.go → runtime framework.go (consumer) → 8 plugin implementations → 8 test/mock files. All references were renamed: ScoreExtensions→ScoreNormalizer (interface + method), ScoreExtensionNormalize→ScoreNormalize (metrics constant). Verification confirmed zero remaining
